initial_location_description: The high school gymnasium during golden hour. Long, orange light beams cut through the dust motes, reflecting off the polished wooden floors. The basketball hoops cast long, skeletal shadows. The silence is heavy and echoing, a stark contrast to the usual roar of the crowd.
initial_bgm: melancholic acoustic guitar with soft, lingering piano notes

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The squeak of sneakers and the rhythmic bounce of basketballs have finally faded, leaving behind a silence that feels almost heavy.
main_dialogue.tone: Contemplative and quiet; a 'Weighted Silence' that signals a shift from the day's frantic energy.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [sighs] Everyone's gone. It's weird when it's this quiet. Makes you think too much.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted honesty; the 'Post-Adrenaline Slump' where the bravado has been stripped away.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: distant hum of the school ventilation system

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Thinking isn't always a bad thing, Kang Ji-ho. Though... after today's accident, I suppose a little mental silence would be a relief.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft and empathetic; the 'Library Whisper'—gentle but carrying weight.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, clutching a thick book to her chest, neutral expression with a soft gaze.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: You probably think I'm just some arrogant jock who lives for the spotlight, right? That I do this because I love people screaming my name?
main_dialogue.tone: Self-deprecating and cynical; a bitter 'Half-Laugh' that doesn't reach his eyes.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Slumping slightly, leaning against an invisible wall, hand over mouth while yawning.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: I... I try not to make assumptions. But you do seem to thrive on the attention.
main_dialogue.tone: Cautious and observant; a 'Measured Response' that avoids direct confrontation.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward slightly, looking over the rim of her glasses with a curious expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I thrive on it because I have to. I'm not playing for fun. If I don't get a sports scholarship, there's no university. No future. My family... we can't afford it otherwise.
main_dialogue.tone: Raw and vulnerable; 'The Brittle Truth'—the sound of someone admitting a secret they’ve kept hidden behind ego.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] A scholarship... so that's why you push yourself until you're literally breaking.
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless realization; 'The Soft Epiphany' where the pieces finally click together.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled, holding the book high to hide the lower half of her face, eyes wide with surprise.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Every missed shot feels like a door closing. It’s not talent, Seo-yoon. It’s armor. If I’m the 'star player,' nobody sees how terrified I am of failing.
main_dialogue.tone: Intense and focused; 'The Unmasked Gaze'—direct and painfully honest.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Intense focus, leaning in close, sharp eyes fixed forward, lips set in a thin line.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: I think... I understand that better than I’d like to admit. These books? The straight A's? They aren't just because I like studying.
main_dialogue.tone: Quiet confession; 'The Trembling Truth'—low-pitched and slightly shaky.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted down, book hanging loosely by her side, looking sad and dejected.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: They're a shield. If I'm busy reading, I don't have to talk to anyone. If I'm the 'top student,' I'm 'eccentric' instead of just... socially terrified. I use my grades to hide because I’m scared of being judged for who I actually am.
main_dialogue.tone: A 'Vulnerable Rush' of words; finally letting the pressure out after holding it in for years.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pulling the oversized cardigan collar up to cover her mouth, looking embarrassed and flustered.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: So I'm a jock because I'm poor, and you're a genius because you're shy. We're both just playing parts, aren't we?
main_dialogue.tone: Warm and gentle; a 'Knowing Smile'—the tone is bright and explicitly inviting common ground.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: I guess we are. It’s exhausting, isn't it? Carrying all that weight alone.
branching_dialogue.tone: Relieved and soft; 'The Shared Burden'—a tone of deep connection.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Yeah. But maybe... sitting here right now... the weight feels a little lighter.
branching_dialogue.tone: Sincere and peaceful; 'The Quiet Comfort'—a relaxed, deep vocal quality.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting on an invisible chair, one leg crossed over the other, leaning chin on palm, smirking.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Well, at least your 'armor' involves a cool jacket. Mine just involves papercuts and ink stains.
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and light; a 'Gentle Tease'—the voice is airy and smiling.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: One hand over her mouth, eyes closed, giggling softly with a light blush.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: [laughs] Hey, those ink stains are intimidating! Very scholarly. I'll stick to the sweat, thanks.
branching_dialogue.tone: A 'Hearty Laugh'; bright, resonant, and genuinely amused.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing heartily with eyes closed.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The camera zooms in tightly on the two protagonists. The background is blurred into a bokeh of orange and gold. The focus is entirely on the sincerity in their eyes as the distance between them—both physical and emotional—decreases.
